title: carthamus glaucus
intro: Carthamus glaucus, also known as the annual blue thistle or scented safflower, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Carthamus glaucus include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
